spec_match.rationale: The demo now treats `body.stack` as the Error.prototype.stack-style DOMString described by the Crash Reporting spec, gated to unresponsive reports and the document policy.

interactive.rationale: Preset stacks, editable stack text, editable lookup JSON, live parsing, source mapping, validation output, and endpoint preview all update from real controls.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature index now describes minified JS stack strings and source-map lookup instead of raw address-to-symbol processing.

edge_cases.rationale: The demo includes missing source-map mappings, malformed stack lines, and invalid lookup JSON so copied-log and partial-map failures are visible.

references.rationale: The page includes direct links to the ChromeStatus entry and the WICG Crash Reporting specification.

design_system.rationale: The page uses shared CSS variables, paired button colors, DOM text rendering for user-provided stack content, and no raw color literals.

summary: Reframed the concept around the actual unresponsive crash report stack string, added source-map-style minified-frame mapping, visible malformed-input handling, and the required references.
